resources.string: Looks like You’re not signed in yet.
In order to change the server, please disconnect the VPN first
Would you like to cancel the current VPN Connection?

🔐 TCP Protocol (Secure & Reliable)
📥 Slower, but stable and safe.
💼 Best for banking, browsing, login.

⚡ UDP Protocol (Fast & Light)
🚀 Super fast, but may drop some data.
🎬 Great for videos, streaming, gaming.

🤔 Not Sure?
➡️ Use 🛡️ TCP for safety.
➡️ Use ⚡ UDP for speed.

✅ Choose what suits your need!

string-array.name: faq_questions
string-array.item: Why do I need a VPN?
Is it safe?
How to use Nocturen VPN?
How to disconnect Nocturen VPN?
Can’t connect, unstable, or speed is slow.
How to switch server location?
Can’t find the server you want?
Why can’t I use the internet after connection is established?
How to disable battery optimization for Nocturen VPN?
How to cancel the subscription in Google Play?
Can I get a refund?
Is Nocturen VPN free or paid?
How to upgrade to Premium?
Is my personal data safe?
Does Nocturen VPN work with Netflix / Amazon Prime?

string-array.name: faq_answers
string-array.item: A VPN (Virtual Private Network) allows you to stay private, secure, and access blocked content online, no matter where you are located.
Yes. We use SSL to encrypt your internet data, making it undecipherable during transmission. We also follow a strict no-log policy — we do not collect, log, store, or share any user data.
Tap the "Start" button in the center of the home screen. If prompted, tap "Trust this application" to allow VPN permission.
Tap the same connect button on the home screen to disconnect from the VPN server.

Connection problems can be caused by many factors. Please update the app to the latest version, refresh the server list, and try connecting to a top server multiple times. If it still doesn’t work, contact us at paypal4212a@gmail.com with your country and network provider name.
Select the server location you want from the server list. The VPN will connect to the selected location.
Please contact us at paypal4212a@gmail.com and provide the website URL you want to unblock. We will review your request and improve our service.
First, check your network connection. Then, disable battery optimization for Nocturen VPN in your Android battery settings.

To disable battery optimization: - Go to Settings > Battery > Battery Optimization - Choose "All apps" from the dropdown - Find Nocturen VPN and select "Don’t optimize"
For Huawei: Settings > Battery > Launch > Manage manually > Enable "Auto launch" and "Run in background". For Samsung: Settings > Battery > App Power Saving > Details > Disable for Nocturen VPN. Other devices may list this under "Protected Apps" or "Background activity".

Google Play subscriptions renew automatically unless you cancel them. To unsubscribe: open Google Play Store > Menu > Subscriptions > Tap the subscription > Tap "Cancel subscription". Details: https://support.google.com/googleplay/answer/2476088
If you don’t cancel your subscription before the trial period ends, you may not be eligible for a refund. For more, visit: https://support.google.com/googleplay/answer/2476088
Nocturen VPN offers both free and premium plans. The free version includes limited speed and servers. Premium unlocks faster speeds, global servers, and full access.
Tap the “Go to Premium” button at the bottom of your Profile page. Choose a subscription plan and complete your payment through Google Play.
Yes. We follow a strict no-log policy. Nocturen VPN does not collect, store, or share any of your personal or browsing data.
Our Premium plan supports some streaming services like Netflix or Amazon Prime. However, content access may vary depending on your location or the streaming platform’s restrictions.
